title: adding graphify to my claude OS
summary: Chase AI demonstrates integrating Graphify into their Claude OS implementation. The video documents the addition of Graphify as a component to an AI operating system built on Claude.
writeup: Chase AI documents adding Graphify as a component to a Claude OS implementation, an AI operating system built on Claude. The video walks through the integration process step by step. The takeaway is a concrete look at how a new component slots into a Claude-based AI operating system.
